samples.label: Path A — catalog item rate query

submission.subject: Confirm current rate for SKU INV-CT-449 (cold-rolled steel sheet 3mm)
submission.description: Hi Procurement, could you confirm the latest contracted rate for SKU INV-CT-449 (cold-rolled steel sheet 3 mm, 1500x3000)? Our last PO had it at INR 8,400 / unit but the price-list refresh on 2026-04-01 should have updated it. Please share the current valid rate sheet.

samples.label: Path B — bulk-discount request (negotiation, not policy)

submission.subject: Volume-discount tier for orders above 5000 units / quarter
submission.description: We are considering committing to 5000+ units per quarter on SKU INV-CT-449 for the next two quarters. Is there a volume-tier discount available beyond the current rate card, and who from your team would lead the commercial negotiation? Happy to share our forecast.
